titleStmt.title: SII 26.682: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 682. (A.R. No. 637 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara, etc.

It records a gift of a nondā lamp and a sum of 30 kāśu to provide for burning it in the temple of the god Tirunallamuḍaiya-mahādēva of Tirunallam, a Brahmadēyam in Veṇṇāḍu in [Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu, by a certain woman Veṇkāḍaṉ] Śaṅgam alias Aiññūṟṟuvachchi for the sake of her younger sister named Veṇkāḍaṉ Iḷai [•••••] alias [•••••] sundari of Tiruvāli in Tiruvālināḍu in Vaḍagarai Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. It is stated that the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple named Kaviśiyaṉ Iḷaiya Sattaṉakkaṉ, Kaviśiyaṉakkaṉ Muṉṉūṟṟuvaṉ, Nakkaṉ Śāttaṉ, Nakkaṉ [Śōdi, Nakkaṉ Ādittaṉ, Nakkaṉ Śōlai, Nakkaṉ Tiruvanantīśvaraṉ] Māḍalaṉ Muṉṉūṟṟuva Nakkaṉ, Pāradāyaṉ Chandirasēkaraṉ Tripurāntaka-bhaṭṭaṉ, Kaviśiyaṉ Tāyaṉ Ṟishabhavāhaṉaṉ and his younger brother accepted the gift with an undertaking to burn the lamp during the period of their turn of worship in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumannivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟccayappāvaiyum cirttanic celviyun tan perunteviyarāki yiṉpuṟa neṭituyaruḻiyil liṭaituṟaināṭum tuṭar vaṉavelippaṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻmatiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyu naṇṇaṟ karumura maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattaraiyar tamuṭiyu māṅkavateviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyu muṉṉavar pak
kaṟṟeṉṉavar vaitta cuntaramuṭiyu mintiranāramum teṉṟicai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvalum Eṟipaṭaikkeraḷa muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅkulataṉamākiya palarpukaḻmuṭiyum ceṅkatirvelaiyuñ caṅkatirvelaittolperuṅkāvil palapaḻantivuñ ceruviṟciṉavilirupattorukālaraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ melvaruñ cāntima
ṟṟivaraṇ karutiyiruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyu māpporu taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāṉa śrīrājentiracoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 7 Āvatu Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu brahmadeyam tirunallattu śivabrāhmaṇan kaviciyaṉ Iḷaiya cāttaṉakkaṉum kaviciyaṉakkaṉ muṉṉūṟṟuvaṉum nakkaṉ cāttaṉum nakkaṉ
cāttaṉum nakkaṉ cotiyum nakkaṉ Ātittaṉum nakkaṉ colaiyum nakkaṉ tiruvanantiśvaraṉum māṭalaṉ muṉṉūṟṟuva nakkaṉum pāratāyaṉ cantiraceka
raṉ tripurān=takabhaṭṭaṉum kaviciyaṉ tāyaṉ ṛṣabhapāhaṉaṉum Ivaṉ tampimāru muḷḷiṭṭa Ivvaṉaivom vaṭakarai rājendracoḻavaḷanāṭṭut tiru
vālināṭṭut tiruvāli Irukkum peṇṭāṭṭi veṇkāṭaṉiḷai māḷa t tasun=tariyaic cārtti Ivaḷ tamakkai veṇkāṭaṉ caṅkamāṉa A
ññūṟṟuvacci tirunallamuṭaiya mahādevaṟukku candrātityaval Eriya vaitta tirunontā viḷakku Oṉṟiṉukku nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu 3 10 Ikkācu muppatum Ivaḷiṭai nāṅkaḷ ko
ṇṭu Ittirunontāviḷakkoṉṟu merikka kaṭavomākavum Eṅkaḷ muṟai ñāḷkaḷil nāṅkaḷerikka kaṭavomākavum Eṅkaḷiṭai vilai koṇṭārum Oṟṟi ko
ṇṭārkaḷum pāttiyamai peṟṟu Uṭaiyārum Ivvaṇamme Inta tirunontāviḷakku Erippatākavum Ivvaṇam Icaintu Ikkācu muppatuṅ koṇṭu śantrātittaval
śāśvatikamāka Erippataṟku Icaintu vittom Ivvaṉaivom Itu panmāyeśvararakṣai . śantrātittaval panmāyeśvararakṣai ..§
Digital edition of SII 26.682 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
